## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/ tools/ examples/` passes
- [ ] `mypy src/arbez/ tools/ tests/` passes (strict mode)
- [ ] `pytest -q tests/` passes
- [ ] New behaviour has tests
- [ ] If architectural: new ADR added to DECISIONS.md with S-NNN id
- [ ] Commit message follows CONTRIBUTING.md norms (descriptive, noreply email, no `--amend`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry under "Unreleased" if user-visible
